title: Rust logging: add structured logging to lichen-link library
description: rust/lichen-link has no logging. Add tracing (for std) or defmt (for no_std) instrumentation for frame parsing errors, signature verification failures, and replay detection. Use feature flags to compile out for size-constrained targets.
close_reason: Added conditional logging (feature=log) to link_layer.rs: warn for unsigned/key-change, debug for unknown-sender/replay
